You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

The yellow text "BREAD" appears at the bottom while a dark smartwatch is visible on the wrist.

[14-16] Hands use a large silver knife to dice white bread into small cubes on a wooden cutting board, accompanied by the yellow text overlay "BREAD". [20-24] A close-up shows hands cracking brown eggs into the bowl, releasing yellow yolks as the text "EGGS" appears. [24-28] The woman whisks the eggs inside the glass bowl with a utensil, creating a smooth yellow mixture, while the pile of diced bread sits on the cutting board to the side.

[28-30] Hands transfer diced white bread cubes from cupped palms into a large clear glass mixing bowl filled with whisked yellow eggs, revealing a dark smartwatch on the left wrist as the ingredients begin to combine in the vessel. [30-34] Shredded yellow cheese is sprinkled over the bread cubes with the yellow text overlay "CHEESE", followed by diced red bell peppers labeled "BELL PEPPER" and cooked bacon bits poured from a small glass bowl labeled "BACON". [34-36] The clear glass bowl displays a colorful mixture of cubed white bread, shredded yellow cheese, diced red bell peppers, and cooked brown bacon bits resting on the wooden cutting board with the label "BACON" visible. [36-40] Chopped green onions are scattered over the top of the bacon and cheese with the text overlay "GREEN ONION", followed by minced white garlic sprinkled over the onions labeled "GARLIC". [40-44] A stream of white liquid milk pours from a large white jug into the bowl with the text "MILK", followed by fine granular white salt sprinkled from a small pink bowl labeled "SALT" onto the accumulating wet ingredients.

[44-46] Black pepper is sprinkled over the mixture of bacon, cheese, and vegetables in the glass bowl. The yellow text overlay changes to read "PEPPER" at the bottom center. Dark specks of seasoning coat the top layer of ingredients, joining the previously added salt and milk.
[46-58] A wooden spoon stirs the mixture inside the large glass bowl, blending the eggs, milk, bread cubes, cheese, bacon, peppers, and seasonings together. The utensil blends the yellow egg mixture with bread cubes, shredded cheese, bacon, red peppers, and green onions. The spoon vigorously mixes the ingredients, blurring slightly from motion, ensuring all components are thoroughly coated. The ingredients tumble and combine as the spoon moves through the bowl resting on the wooden cutting board, blending the distinct layers into a unified, colorful batter.

[60-62] A wide shot shows a woman with long dark hair in a white crochet top stirring the bowl. She stands at a counter with stainless steel appliances and white cabinets behind her. A white milk jug sits on the counter to her left as she mixes the ingredients.

[62-64] The camera cuts to a medium shot of the woman in the white crochet top. She continues to stir the mixture in the glass bowl with a wooden spoon while looking up and speaking. A silver fork pierces the casserole, lifting a bite. [8-10] A woman in a white crochet top stands in a kitchen, pointing forward before slicing bread on a wooden board. A purple graphic reads "Get Cookin' With Nicole McLaughlin". [10-14] Close-up shots show hands using a silver knife to dice white bread into cubes on the board. The yellow text "BREAD" appears at the bottom while a dark smartwatch is visible on the wrist.

[14-16] Hands use a large silver knife to dice white bread into small cubes on a wooden cutting board, accompanied by the yellow text overlay "BREAD". [16-20] The view shifts to a woman in a white crochet top standing at a kitchen counter with a large clear glass bowl, holding a brown egg. [20-24] A close-up shows hands cracking brown eggs into the bowl, releasing yellow yolks as the text "EGGS" appears. [24-28] The woman whisks the eggs inside the glass bowl with a utensil, creating a smooth yellow mixture, while the pile of diced bread sits on the cutting board to the side.

[28-30] Hands transfer diced white bread cubes from cupped palms into a large clear glass mixing bowl filled with whisked yellow eggs, revealing a dark smartwatch on the left wrist as the ingredients begin to combine in the vessel. [30-34] Shredded yellow cheese is sprinkled over the bread cubes with the yellow text overlay "CHEESE", followed by diced red bell peppers labeled "BELL PEPPER" and cooked bacon bits poured from a small glass bowl labeled "BACON". [34-36] The clear glass bowl displays a colorful mixture of cubed white bread, shredded yellow cheese, diced red bell peppers, and cooked brown bacon bits resting on the wooden cutting board with the label "BACON" visible. [36-40] Chopped green onions are scattered over the top of the bacon and cheese with the text overlay "GREEN ONION", followed by minced white garlic sprinkled over the onions labeled "GARLIC". [40-44] A stream of white liquid milk pours from a large white jug into the bowl with the text "MILK", followed by fine granular white salt sprinkled from a small pink bowl labeled "SALT" onto the accumulating wet ingredients.

[44-46] Black pepper is sprinkled over the mixture of bacon, cheese, and vegetables in the glass bowl. The yellow text overlay changes to read "PEPPER" at the bottom center. Dark specks of seasoning coat the top layer of ingredients, joining the previously added salt and milk.

The spoon vigorously mixes the ingredients, blurring slightly from motion, ensuring all components are thoroughly coated. The ingredients tumble and combine as the spoon moves through the bowl resting on the wooden cutting board, blending the distinct layers into a unified, colorful batter.

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A yellow rectangular baking dish holds a golden egg casserole speckled with meat and vegetables. A black spatula lifts a square slice and places it onto a white fluted plate. [4-8] Sliced green onions garnish the dish as the text "How to Make Easy Breakfast Casserole" appears. A silver fork pierces the casserole, lifting a bite. [8-10] A woman in a white crochet top stands in a kitchen, pointing forward before slicing bread on a wooden board. A purple graphic reads "Get Cookin' With Nicole McLaughlin". [10-14] Close-up shots show hands using a silver knife to dice white bread into cubes on the board. The yellow text "BREAD" appears at the bottom while a dark smartwatch is visible on the wrist. [14-16] Hands use a large silver knife to dice white bread into small cubes on a wooden cutting board, accompanied by the yellow text overlay "BREAD". [16-20] The view shifts to a woman in a white crochet top standing at a kitchen counter with a large clear glass bowl, holding a brown egg. [20-24] A close-up shows hands cracking brown eggs into the bowl, releasing yellow yolks as the text "EGGS" appears. [24-28] The woman whisks the eggs

[70-74] A woman in a white crochet top stands in a kitchen holding a yellow rectangular baking dish with a white interior. She gestures with her right hand while supporting the dish, standing before a counter with a glass bowl containing a mixture and a wooden spoon on a wooden board. [74-78] She holds the yellow dish with her left hand and raises her right hand to gesture with curled fingers while looking at the camera. She then uses both hands to place the yellow baking dish onto the wooden cutting board next to the glass bowl. [78-82] The woman speaks to the camera, gesturing with her hands near the yellow dish and the mixture bowl. She keeps her hands low near the dish on the wooden board while explaining the process, with stainless steel appliances and white shelves visible in the background.

[86-88] A colorful mixture of bread cubes, shredded cheese, bacon, and vegetables pours from a clear glass bowl into a yellow baking dish. [88-94] A wooden spoon spreads the chunky mixture of bread, cheese, and diced peppers inside the yellow rectangular baking dish. The utensil moves through the wet ingredients, distributing the shredded cheese and diced peppers evenly across the white interior surface to create a uniform layer. The spoon pushes the contents toward the corners, ensuring the wet ingredients settle into the container.

[94-96] A woman in a white crochet top holds a yellow rectangular baking dish containing an uncooked casserole mixture of bread, cheese, and vegetables with both hands at chest level, smiling slightly as she presents it in a kitchen with stainless steel appliances. [96-102] She shifts to holding the dish with her left hand while gesturing with her right hand, moving her fingers from spread to curled positions as she speaks directly to the camera. White shelves with colorful items and kitchen tools remain visible in the background. The sequence ends with the dish being placed into the oven.

[102-104] A woman in a white crochet top holds a yellow baking dish at chest level, gesturing with her right hand while speaking in a kitchen featuring stainless steel appliances and white shelves. [104-108] A hand places the yellow rectangular baking dish, filled with an uncooked, colorful casserole mixture, onto the middle wire rack of a stainless steel oven illuminated by an interior light, then withdraws leaving the dish in the open cavity. [108-112] The stainless steel oven door closes, enclosing the dish inside; through the glass window, the casserole rests on the rack under the light, while a blue digital clock display glows on the control panel above the handle.

recent_thinks: [68-70] The woman in the white crochet top looks down while holding a wooden spoon. She stands in front of a stainless steel range hood and white shelves with colorful glassware. Her mouth is slightly open as she speaks, keeping her gaze fixed on the mixing bowl below the frame.

[82-84] The woman holds a yellow and red spray can in her right hand, actively spraying the interior of the yellow rectangular baking dish. Bold yellow text reading "BAKING SPRAY" appears at the bottom center of the screen as she coats the white ceramic surface of the dish.

[84-86] Hands maneuver the yellow and red spray can over the yellow rectangular baking dish, coating the white inside. The bold yellow text "BAKING SPRAY" remains fixed at the bottom center of the screen above the wooden cutting board as the spraying action continues across the interior.

[112-114] The scene cuts to the woman holding the yellow baking dish with blue oven mitts, revealing the fully baked golden-brown casserole. She stands in the kitchen with stainless steel appliances behind her, presenting the cooked dish which features melted cheese and browned edges.
